name: Gilat Satellite Networks Ltd.
description: Gilat Satellite Networks Ltd. is a leading global provider of satellite-based broadband communications. With over 30 years of experience, the company designs and manufactures cutting-edge ground segment equipment, and provides comprehensive solutions and end-to-end services, powered by its innovative technology. Gilat's portfolio comprises a cloud-based satellite network platform, VSATs, amplifiers, high-speed modems, on-the-move antennas, and high-power Solid State Power Amplifiers (SSPAs). Gilat provides solutions for mission-critical applications, such as broadband access, cellular backhaul, enterprise communications, in-flight connectivity, maritime, and defense.
